---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  contents:
    - title: "Becoming e(E)arth"
      author: "**de Oliveira Junior, A. C.**; Sousa, R.S."
      date: "2023-12"
      categories: [Essay, First Author, Philosophy]
      description: "Here I argument in favor of the inclusion of poetry as a way to teach and learn science."
      path: "https://doi.org/10.46667/renbio.v16i1.1008"
    
    - title: "Environmental heterogeneity as a determinant of bee diversity patterns in the Atlantic Forest"
      author: "Antonio, A.I.; **de Oliveira Junior, A.C.**; Villalobos, F.; Velazco, S.J.E."
      date: "2025-05"
      categories: [Paper, Computational ecology, Co-author]
      description: "Modeled the distribution of several bee species to identify the role of environmental heterogeneity in bee diversity. Used georeferenced occurrence data and geospatial environmental predictors."
      path: "https://doi.org/10.21425/fob.18.142410"
      
    - title: "`adm`: An R package for constructing abundance‐based species distribution models"
      author: "**de Oliveira Junior, A.C.**; Velazco, S.J.E."
      date: "2025-06"
      categories: [Paper, Software, Tools, First Author]
      description: "Developed a R package that supports full workflows for construction and validation of Abundance-based Species Distribution Models."
      path: "https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.70074"
      
    - title: "Diversity, floral visitation pattern, and conservation of stingless bees (Apidae: Meliponini) in the Brazilian Legal Amazon"
      author: "Soares, I.M.N.; **de Oliveira Junior, A.C.**; Antonio, A.I.; Nogueira, D.S.; Velazco, S.J.E."
      date: "2026-01"
      categories: [Paper, Computational ecology, Co-author]
      description: "Estimated the distribution and diversity of bees in the Amazon, evaluated the representativeness of meliponines within protected areas, and investigate the influence of the remaining habitat on species richness."
      path: "https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jnc.2025.127120"
---

<style>
  .listing-title {
    font-size: 1.15rem !important;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
</style>

A collection of my academic papers, essays, and technical contributions.

::: {#sample-listings}
:::
